summary: Comprehensive testing of German towing management web application completed successfully. Backend API shows 90.5% success rate with all core functionality working. Frontend UI is fully functional with proper navigation, forms, and user interactions. Integration between frontend and backend is working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 for job creation
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - job is created successfully

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - access is correctly blocked

passed_tests: Landing page loads with vehicle search functionality
User registration for Authority role with all required fields
User registration for Towing Service role with 6-char code generation
User login for all roles (admin, authority, towing_service)
Job creation with license plate, location, photos, and notes
Public vehicle search (both found and not found scenarios)
Admin dashboard with stats and user management
Navigation between pages (landing, login, register, dashboards)
Error handling for invalid credentials and duplicate registrations
Responsive form elements and user interactions
